content: sklearn SGD update: w<-w-eta*(alpha*dR/dw + dL/dw). 'optimal' eta=1/(alpha*(t0+t-1)), t0=optimal_init=1/(initial_eta0*alpha), initial_eta0=typw/max(1,dloss(-typw,1)) with typw=sqrt(1/sqrt(alpha)). invscaling eta=eta0/t^power_t (power_t=0.25 default reg). constant=eta0. adaptive: eta0 then /5 on no-improvement until <1e-6. dloss: Hinge z=p*y; if z<=1 grad=-y else 0. SquaredHinge z=1-p*y; if z>0 grad=-2*y*z else 0. Log grad: -y/(1+exp(y*p)) form (log_loss=log(1+exp(-yp))). SquaredError grad=p-y (loss .5(p-y)^2). EpsilonInsensitive: if y-p>eps grad=-1; if p-y>eps grad=1; else 0. SquaredEpsilonInsensitive z=y-p; if z>eps grad=-2(z-eps); if z<-eps grad=2(-z-eps); else 0. Penalty L2 lazy w.scale(1-(1-l1_ratio)*eta*alpha); L1 cumulative u+=l1_ratio*eta*alpha then l1penalty shrink. intercept update += update*intercept_decay (1.0 dense, 0.01 sparse), unpenalized. Defaults SGDClassifier loss=hinge penalty=l2 alpha=1e-4 l1_ratio=0.15 max_iter=1000 tol=1e-3 lr=optimal eta0=0.01 power_t=0.5; SGDRegressor loss=squared_error lr=invscaling eta0=0.01 power_t=0.25 epsilon=0.1.
